summary: Frontend-only testing of Cled's Plannéo (localStorage migration). Verified brand 'Cled's Plannéo', greeting 'Bonsoir/Good evening Cled', quick-add task creation+persistence, mobile nav routing, language toggle, localStorage seeds (12 exercises, sleep goals singleton), reload persistence (tasks/sleep retained, lang persisted), and CRITICAL requirement: ZERO /api/* network calls intercepted across the session.

integration_issues.flow: Mobile bottom nav from Calendar page
integration_issues.issue: After landing on /calendar, subsequent clicks on nav-sleep-mobile / nav-workout-mobile / nav-stats-mobile did not change URL (stayed at /calendar) despite force-click. Other navigations (dashboard->tasks->calendar) worked. Possible click interception by a shadcn Calendar/day-picker overlay or popover capturing pointer events at bottom-nav coordinates. Needs visual repro on real device.

issues: 'Cled's' and 'Plannéo' have no visible space between them on rendered DOM (text content reads 'Cled'sPlannéo'). They are separate spans with gap-2 so visually OK, but a screen-reader/automation will see them concatenated. Cosmetic only.

action_items: Investigate why mobile bottom-nav links don't navigate away from /calendar route. Check CalendarPage for any full-viewport popover/overlay or pointer-events that may sit over the fixed bottom nav at 390px.
Manually verify on real mobile viewport that Sleep/Workout/Stats tabs are reachable from Calendar.
critical_code_review_comments: localdb.js seed() runs at module import time — fine for browser, but generateRecurring() also runs at import which mutates storage on every full reload. Acceptable for this app.
api.js wrap() always resolves, no error path; pages catch nothing meaningful. Low risk for localStorage.
Layout brand spans use gap-2 visually but text content concatenates — consider adding a non-breaking space for accessibility.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_quick_task via UI quick-add and one TEST sleep entry via JS evaluate to verify persistence; remain in localStorage (cled_tasks_v1, cled_sleep_v1).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Critical localStorage requirement is met (0 /api/* calls). Brand+greeting+lang+quick-add+reload-persistence all pass. Open issue: from /calendar route, mobile bottom-nav clicks to sleep/workout/stats did not navigate in Playwright — please reproduce manually at 390x844 and inspect for overlay z-index or pointer-events on Calendar page.
rca of the issue: Hypothesis: shadcn Calendar component or its day-modifier popover/overlay on CalendarPage may overlay the fixed bottom-nav region (z-40) at mobile breakpoint, or capture pointer events. Repro: open /calendar at 390px and tap Sleep tab in bottom nav.
